creator: freebsd@dev.thsi.be
text:
I created https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=282947 for the update to 5.9.0.

(In reply to Älven from comment #4)
All good, I needed to test and check for myself too, since I felt a bit responsible for introducing the bug in the first place... Good catch in any case! The committer should credit you for this PR, whatever gets committed, in fine.
